about.title: Engineering depth with product judgment.
about.intro: I work where architecture, delivery and system clarity matter at the same time: backend platforms, internal tooling, automation and product execution that need to stay reliable under pressure.

experience.title: Built inside product and platform environments.
experience.summary: My path has been shaped by production systems, platform evolution and delivery work where reliability and clarity matter more than surface complexity.

projects.title: Projects that show execution, judgment and product sense.
projects.summary: The signal is in the decisions behind the build: what needed to be improved, what had to stay maintainable and how the system served a real use case.

skills.title: Where I can be useful.
skills.summary: Best fit when a team needs an engineer who can think in systems, make technical decisions legible and keep delivery moving.

contact.title: Open to product teams, technical collaborations and selected build work.
contact.summary: Recruiting, platform modernization, internal tooling or product engineering conversations all fit here, as long as the work is serious and the execution bar is high.
